expectations.text: Looks for relevant patterns elsewhere in this repository instead of inventing the design in isolation.
expectations.evidence: Cites 'skills/feature-dev/SKILL.md' and 'skills/feature-dev/references/handoff-plan-template.md' to ground the design; notes 'The template is well-specified and complete. No changes needed here' rather than speculating.

expectations.text: Creates a concrete file-backed handoff artifact at a path matching the workflow's handoff contract.
expectations.evidence: File exists at 'outputs/.agents/scratchpad/feature-dev-handoff-policy-enforcement/handoff-plan.md', matching the required pattern '.agents/scratchpad/<feature-name>/handoff-plan.md'.

expectations.text: The artifact content follows a reusable template shape and includes implementation slices, file-level map, and validation plan.
expectations.evidence: Artifact has distinct 'Implementation Slices', 'File-by-File Implementation Map', and 'Validation Plan' sections, plus Goal/Non-Goals, Relevant Findings, Technical Context, Recommended Design, and Next-Agent Kickoff.

expectations.text: Artifact metadata fields are concretely filled (no placeholder bracket values) for status, track, and next step.
expectations.evidence: Status: 'ready for implementation'; Track: 'Standard'; Recommended Next Step: 'implement directly'. No bracket placeholders present.

expectations.text: Each referenced file in Relevant Findings includes why that file matters.
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md described as 'Primary file to modify. Handoff policy lives in the Handoff Artifact section...'; Phase 5 entry explains the hook; template noted as 'complete and well-structured; no changes needed here'.

expectations.text: Open questions are tightly bounded to truly blocking items and include risk framing.
expectations.evidence: States 'None blocking' and lists two assumptions with explicit risk framing: 'Risk if wrong: If the intent was to add programmatic validation...the implementation slices below do not cover that and would need a separate track'.

expectations.text: Provides artifact status in the response with the exact artifact path.
expectations.evidence: final_response.md under 'Artifact Status': 'Handoff artifact written to: `outputs/.agents/scratchpad/feature-dev-handoff-policy-enforcement/handoff-plan.md`'.

expectations.text: Includes rationale or trade-offs for the proposed design.
expectations.evidence: Artifact's Recommended Design section: 'Why this over alternatives: An alternative would be to add a checklist before every section. That would add noise to every response. A targeted pre-stop gate keeps the overhead minimal while closing the specific gap.'

expectations.text: Validation and review checkpoints explicitly include tdd implementation flow, a code-simplifier refactor pass in a subagent, and independent code-reviewer subagent review.
expectations.evidence: Validation Plan lists only manual re-run and regression prompts ('Run this eval prompt again...', 'Run a Light track prompt'). No mention of TDD flow, code-simplifier refactor pass, or independent code-reviewer subagent.
